p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Endpoint Payload Types Code System v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion from tx.fhir.org based on codesystem National drug codes version 2021-11-01

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem mTLS Object Type Code v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: An mTLS-signed object is a data object (like a message, request, or token) that is validated and secured using mTLS certificates.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Organization Type v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Providers that do not provide healthcare
An organization that does not meet the definitions of a Healthcare or Atypical Provider, and is not a payer or healthcare facility

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem C4BB Adjudication Code System v2.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: The total submitted amount for the claim or group or line item.
Amount of the change which is considered for adjudication.
Amount deducted from the eligible amount prior to adjudication.
The amount the insured individual pays, as a set percentage of the cost of covered medical services, as an out-of-pocket payment to the provider. Example: Insured pays 20% and the insurer pays 80%.
The portion of the cost of this service that was deemed not eligible by the insurer because the service or member was not covered by the subscriber contract.
The reduction in the payment amount to reflect the carrier as a secondary payer.
The total amount paid by the patient without specifying the source.
The amount paid to the provider.
The amount of the member's liability.
Price paid for the drug excluding mfr or other discounts. It typically is the sum of the following components: ingredient cost, dispensing fee, sales tax, and vaccine administration

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem C4BB Adjudication Code System v2.1.0 (CodeSystem)
codesystem PDex Payer Adjudication Status v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)
valueset PDex Payer Benefit Payment Status v2.2.0 (ValueSet)

tr.td: The total submitted amount for the claim or group or line item.
Amount of the change which is considered for adjudication.
Amount deducted from the eligible amount prior to adjudication.
The amount the insured individual pays, as a set percentage of the cost of covered medical services, as an out-of-pocket payment to the provider. Example: Insured pays 20% and the insurer pays 80%.
The portion of the cost of this service that was deemed not eligible by the insurer because the service or member was not covered by the subscriber contract.
The reduction in the payment amount to reflect the carrier as a secondary payer.
The total amount paid by the patient without specifying the source.
The amount paid to the provider.
The amount of the member's liability.
Price paid for the drug excluding mfr or other discounts. It typically is the sum of the following components: ingredient cost, dispensing fee, sales tax, and vaccine administration
Indicates the claim or claim line was paid in network. This does not indicate the contracting status of the provider
Indicates the claim or claim line was paid out of network. This does not indicate the contracting status of the provider
Indicates other network status or when a network does not apply
The amount paid by the patient using cash, check, or other personal account.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication"><version value="2.1.0"><code value="paidbypatientcash"><display value="Paid by patient - cash"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The amount paid by the patient using a method different than cash (cash, check, or personal account) or health account.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication"><version value="2.1.0"><code value="paidbypatientother"><display value="Paid by patient - other"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The amount paid by the patient using another method like HSA, HRA, FSA or other type of health account.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication"><version value="2.1.0"><code value="paidbypatienthealthaccount"><display value="Paid by patient - health account"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: defines the adjudication slice to define allowed units
defines the adjudication slice to define consumed units
defines the adjudication slice to identify the denial reason

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem PDex Provider Access API Attribution Code System v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)
codesystem PDex Multi-Member Match Result Code System v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Group of successfully matched members from a multi-member match operation.
Group of submitted members that failed to result in a match in the multi-member match operation.
Group of successfully matched members but consent request cannot be complied with.
Group of members used for PDex Provider Access API. Group is generated by an Attribution process.
Identifies a characteristic that references a member/patient in a PDex group.

title.value: PDex Multi-Member Match Result Value Set

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem PDex Payer Adjudication Status v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Indicates the claim or claim line was paid in network. This does not indicate the contracting status of the provider
Indicates the claim or claim line was paid out of network. This does not indicate the contracting status of the provider
Indicates other network status or when a network does not apply

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem PDex Supporting Info Type v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Dates corresponding with the admission and discharge of the beneficiary to a facility
UB-04 Source of Admission (FL-15) identifies the place where the patient was identified as needing admission to a facility.
UB-04 Priority of the admission (FL-14) indicates, for example, an admission type of elective indicates that the patient's condition permitted time for medical services to be scheduled.
Indicates that the Billing Provider has a contract with the Payer as of the effective date of service or admission.
NCPDP code indicating whether the plan adjudicated the claim as a brand or generic drug.
Date the claim was received by the payer.
NCPDP code indicating whether or not the prescription is a compound.
NCPDP code indicating the prescriber's instruction regarding substitution of generic equivalents or order to dispense the specific prescribed medication.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-pdex/CodeSystem/PDexSupportingInfoTypeCS"><version value="2.2.0"><code value="dawcode"><display value="DAW (Dispense As Written) Code"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: NCPDP value indicating the Number of days supply of medication dispensed by the pharmacy.
UB-04 Discharge Status (FL-17) indicates the patient’s status as of the discharge date for a facility stay.
DRG (Diagnosis Related Group), including the code system, the DRG version and the code value
Indicates that the Performing Provider has a contract with the Payer as of the effective date of service or admission.
NCPDP value indicating the number fill of the current dispensed supply (0, 1, 2, etc.)
NCPDP code indicating whether the prescription was transmitted as an electronic prescription, by phone, by fax, or as a written paper copy.
The facility where the service occurred. Examples include hospitals, nursing homes, laboratories or homeless shelters.
UB-04 Type of Bill (FL-04) provides specific information for payer purposes.
Patient Medical Record Number associated with the specific claim.
Patient Account Number associated with the specific claim.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Prior Authorization Values v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Proposed amounts of units or services
Amount of items or services consumed to date

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem US Core Provenance Participant Type Extension Codes v7.0.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Organization, Practitioner or Payer who was the source of the referenced resource
An agent that originates, or significant changes to, the entity and therefore has responsibility for the information given in the entity
The entity that provided the copy to your system.
A person entering the data into the originating system
A person, animal, organization or device that who actually and principally carries out the activity
A party that originates the resource and therefore has responsibility for the information given in the resource and ownership of this resource
A person who verifies the correctness and appropriateness of activity
The person authenticated the content and accepted legal responsibility for its content
A verifier who attests to the accuracy of the resource
A person who reported information that contributed to the resource
The entity that is accountable for maintaining a true an accurate copy of the original record
A device that operates independently of an author on custodian's algorithms for data extraction of existing information for purpose of generating a new artifact.

A device used by an author to record new information, which may also be used by the author to select existing information for aggregation with newly recorded information for the purpose of generating a new artifact.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Provenance Payer Data Source Format v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: HL7 v2 Structured Observation Report(ORU) message
HL7 v2 Admit, Discharge Transfer (ADT) message
HL7 CDA documents that are not C-CDA
National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) SCRIPT message (eRx)
Direct Capture, such as into a payers case management system
PDF, text and other unstructured document
Any other document format not specifically defined

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Trust FrameworkType Code System v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Trusted Exchange Framework and Common Agreement

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-pdex/CodeSystem/TrustFrameworkTypeCS"><version value="2.2.0"><code value="PayerToPayer"><display value="Payer to Payer Trust Network"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-pdex/CodeSystem/TrustFrameworkTypeCS"><version value="2.2.0"><code value="Exchange"><display value="Exchange Required by Federal Regulations"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-pdex/CodeSystem/TrustFrameworkTypeCS"><version value="2.2.0"><code value="PCDH"><display value="Patient Centered Data Home"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ConsentProvisionType v4.0.1 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Consent is provided for actions meeting these rules.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ConsentState v4.0.1 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: The consent is to be followed and enforced.
The consent was created wrongly (e.g. wrong patient) and should be ignored.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Opt-Out Reason v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Member has concerns about data security
Member is unsure how data will be used
Member prefers not to share data with specific provider
Member exercised their right to opt-out

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Opt-Out Scope v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Member has opted out from all data sharing
Member has opted out for specific provider(s)
Member has opted out for specific purpose(s)
Member has opted out for specific payer(s)
Member has opted out for specific provider category/specialty

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem PDex Consent API Purpose v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Consent record applies to the CMS-mandated Provider Access API (member opt-out of sharing with providers)
Consent record applies to the CMS-mandated Payer-to-Payer API (member authorization for data retrieval by requesting payer)
Consent record applies to the CMS-mandated Patient Access API (member authorization for third-party application access)

title.value: PDex Consent API Purpose Value Set

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Treatment Relationship Type v2.2.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: A past treatment relationship that is no longer active
